creator: avilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
Do you still get these problems?

What do you mean with "locking"? Does it ask for a password as in
"enter password to unlock KWallet" or does it really lock the screen
(i.e., everything disappears apart from the password form)?
Can you check in global settings what's the key associated to session
locking (in Run Command Interface section)?

Can you expand a bit more on power saving notifications?
